root-question.text: Is the main agent using an expensive model (sonnet/opus tier)?

question.text: Is a cheap classifier model available (haiku/mini/flash-lite)?
Is a calibration set (~100 labelled legit vs noise examples) available?

branch.conclusion: Install guardrail. Monitor FP rate against calibration set.
Build calibration set first; guardrail without FP monitoring drifts.
Skip — no cheap model means no cost asymmetry.
Skip — main is already cheap; guardrail doesn't save enough.

example.p: main_expensive=true (sonnet) → cheap_available=true (haiku) → calibration_ready=true (100 labelled) → conclusion: install.
